records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long have I been running?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long have I been running?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long have I been running?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My vision is getting increasingly blurry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My vision is getting increasingly blurry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My vision is getting increasingly blurry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Am I... going the right way?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Am I... going the right way?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Am I... going the right way?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this fog...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this fog...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this fog...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not something dangerous like Corruption rays, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not something dangerous like Corruption rays, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not something dangerous like Corruption rays, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be scared of whatever might happen once you open the door, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be scared of whatever might happen once you open the door, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be scared of whatever might happen once you open the door, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. I remember.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. I remember.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. I remember.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I felt this same energy when I first opened the door of the garden.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I felt this same energy when I first opened the door of the garden.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I felt this same energy when I first opened the door of the garden.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I will see from this point on is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I will see from this point on is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I will see from this point on is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...memories of the past.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...memories of the past.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...memories of the past.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is that?! Where did that monster appear from?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is that?! Where did that monster appear from?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is that?! Where did that monster appear from?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Argh! It feels like something is crawling under my skin... I don't like it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Argh! It feels like something is crawling under my skin... I don't like it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Argh! It feels like something is crawling under my skin... I don't like it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's over now! There is nowhere to run!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's over now! There is nowhere to run!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's over now! There is nowhere to run!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop, Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop, Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop, Pavlin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The people are in danger! We must save them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The people are in danger! We must save them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The people are in danger! We must save them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is not the C.O. you know of. It's not something that we can stop!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is not the C.O. you know of. It's not something that we can stop!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is not the C.O. you know of. It's not something that we can stop!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration! It's our job to protect the people
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration! It's our job to protect the people
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration! It's our job to protect the people
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration has lost most of its units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration has lost most of its units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration has lost most of its units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, are you going to die in vain trying to prevent what has already been predetermined?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, are you going to die in vain trying to prevent what has already been predetermined?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, are you going to die in vain trying to prevent what has already been predetermined?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have I not made it clear?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have I not made it clear?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have I not made it clear?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's fate was decided.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's fate was decided.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's fate was decided.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... Hrgh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... Hrgh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... Hrgh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all my fault. I was weak...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all my fault. I was weak...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all my fault. I was weak...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I promised to save the world... but I couldn't even save my comrades in front of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I promised to save the world... but I couldn't even save my comrades in front of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I promised to save the world... but I couldn't even save my comrades in front of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin. It's not your fault the Wolf died. It's mine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin. It's not your fault the Wolf died. It's mine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin. It's not your fault the Wolf died. It's mine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the Wolf's life was taken by <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> who is using the Qliphoth Game as an excuse to toy with us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the Wolf's life was taken by <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> who is using the Qliphoth Game as an excuse to toy with us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the Wolf's life was taken by <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> who is using the Qliphoth Game as an excuse to toy with us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this where this world ends?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this where this world ends?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this where this world ends?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the whims of the god Tammiel do not stop here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the whims of the god Tammiel do not stop here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the whims of the god Tammiel do not stop here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She will create another world exactly like this, and destroy it the same way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She will create another world exactly like this, and destroy it the same way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She will create another world exactly like this, and destroy it the same way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does god... want us to suffer forever?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does god... want us to suffer forever?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does god... want us to suffer forever?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... do not know. And neither does the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... do not know. And neither does the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... do not know. And neither does the Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it doesn't matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever it is that Tammiel wants, we will put an end to it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever it is that Tammiel wants, we will put an end to it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever it is that Tammiel wants, we will put an end to it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, stand back up. Our priority right now is to get back to the Ark alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, stand back up. Our priority right now is to get back to the Ark alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, stand back up. Our priority right now is to get back to the Ark alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is... abandoning all those people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is... abandoning all those people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is... abandoning all those people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know it's out of their hands, but... there were children who were much younger than me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know it's out of their hands, but... there were children who were much younger than me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know it's out of their hands, but... there were children who were much younger than me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...? The garden?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...? The garden?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...? The garden?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's someone I've never seen before with Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's someone I've never seen before with Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's someone I've never seen before with Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who is that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who is that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who is that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The world... is going to restart?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The world... is going to restart?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The world... is going to restart?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The end of this world means the birth of another.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The end of this world means the birth of another.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The end of this world means the birth of another.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like a watermill, it always returns to its original position.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like a watermill, it always returns to its original position.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like a watermill, it always returns to its original position.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then we... will forget everything and repeat this fate again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then we... will forget everything and repeat this fate again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then we... will forget everything and repeat this fate again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Administrator, you said that you are able to remember the past worlds through the Ark, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Administrator, you said that you are able to remember the past worlds through the Ark, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Administrator, you said that you are able to remember the past worlds through the Ark, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How many cycles of this have we gone through?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How many cycles of this have we gone through?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How many cycles of this have we gone through?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Too much that I can't see the beginning of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Too much that I can't see the beginning of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Too much that I can't see the beginning of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There have been countless attempts to stop this cycle, and we have made progress each time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There have been countless attempts to stop this cycle, and we have made progress each time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There have been countless attempts to stop this cycle, and we have made progress each time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, it's not easy finding a path to an ending that we never reached before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, it's not easy finding a path to an ending that we never reached before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, it's not easy finding a path to an ending that we never reached before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Master once told me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Master once told me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Master once told me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That in the first world, we couldn't even struggle, much less attempt anything against the apocalypse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That in the first world, we couldn't even struggle, much less attempt anything against the apocalypse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That in the first world, we couldn't even struggle, much less attempt anything against the apocalypse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now, Master is here... and we have an amazing technology called the Ark.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now, Master is here... and we have an amazing technology called the Ark.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now, Master is here... and we have an amazing technology called the Ark.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps if we keep on going... a day will come when this tragedy will cease.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps if we keep on going... a day will come when this tragedy will cease.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps if we keep on going... a day will come when this tragedy will cease.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must make it so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must make it so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must make it so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This memory is about the day the Administration left the treasure with Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This memory is about the day the Administration left the treasure with Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This memory is about the day the Administration left the treasure with Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother told me that we would meet the Administration again one day, but... this is different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother told me that we would meet the Administration again one day, but... this is different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother told me that we would meet the Administration again one day, but... this is different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The expressions on their faces... aren't expecting a reunion at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The expressions on their faces... aren't expecting a reunion at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The expressions on their faces... aren't expecting a reunion at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you need me in order to reach the ending where the world is saved...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you need me in order to reach the ending where the world is saved...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you need me in order to reach the ending where the world is saved...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll gladly follow your plan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll gladly follow your plan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll gladly follow your plan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I appreciate it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I appreciate it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I appreciate it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
To put this burden on you, I'm
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
To put this burden on you, I'm
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
To put this burden on you, I'm
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the Antagonist... I was disappointed that I couldn't be more helpful. But I'm glad you suggested this to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the Antagonist... I was disappointed that I couldn't be more helpful. But I'm glad you suggested this to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the Antagonist... I was disappointed that I couldn't be more helpful. But I'm glad you suggested this to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, please don't so look sad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, please don't so look sad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, please don't so look sad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't look back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't look back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't look back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You entrusted me with this mission not to regret it, but for everyone's future. Right, Administrator?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You entrusted me with this mission not to regret it, but for everyone's future. Right, Administrator?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You entrusted me with this mission not to regret it, but for everyone's future. Right, Administrator?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, it's just us two, my child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, it's just us two, my child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, it's just us two, my child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry... that I haven't done anything for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry... that I haven't done anything for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry... that I haven't done anything for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No. Please don't say that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No. Please don't say that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No. Please don't say that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were my whole world, Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were my whole world, Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were my whole world, Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... was happy just being with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... was happy just being with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... was happy just being with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so sorry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so sorry...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so sorry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't protect the future... you would be born into.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't protect the future... you would be born into.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't protect the future... you would be born into.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm right here. You raised me, Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm right here. You raised me, Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm right here. You raised me, Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you saying that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you saying that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you saying that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That sounds as if...! I was never supposed to be born
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
That sounds as if...! I was never supposed to be born
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
That sounds as if...! I was never supposed to be born

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Home?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Home?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Home?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oww.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Careful now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Careful now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Careful now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you are a young Counter, you'll need to rest for your broken bones to heal properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you are a young Counter, you'll need to rest for your broken bones to heal properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you are a young Counter, you'll need to rest for your broken bones to heal properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where's Mother...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where's Mother...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where's Mother...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you defeat her, Parry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you defeat her, Parry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you defeat her, Parry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not that strong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not that strong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not that strong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I calmed her down for a moment so she wouldn't step out of the door.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I calmed her down for a moment so she wouldn't step out of the door.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I calmed her down for a moment so she wouldn't step out of the door.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She can't return to who she was, can she?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She can't return to who she was, can she?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She can't return to who she was, can she?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I will stop here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I will stop here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I will stop here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to do anything anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to do anything anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to do anything anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is a memory that Pavlin stored in the deepest part of the inner yard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is a memory that Pavlin stored in the deepest part of the inner yard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is a memory that Pavlin stored in the deepest part of the inner yard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In order to get that memory back, I need your help with Pavlin's Watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In order to get that memory back, I need your help with Pavlin's Watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In order to get that memory back, I need your help with Pavlin's Watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see that the treasure is more important to you, Parry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see that the treasure is more important to you, Parry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see that the treasure is more important to you, Parry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration was going to use Mother from the start, didn't they?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration was going to use Mother from the start, didn't they?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration was going to use Mother from the start, didn't they?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin was our comrade. And we don't take advantage of comrades.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin was our comrade. And we don't take advantage of comrades.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin was our comrade. And we don't take advantage of comrades.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what you think, Parry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what you think, Parry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what you think, Parry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead of saving the world, the Administration left Mother here and fled!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead of saving the world, the Administration left Mother here and fled!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead of saving the world, the Administration left Mother here and fled!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was Pavlin's choice! We didn't force her...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was Pavlin's choice! We didn't force her...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was Pavlin's choice! We didn't force her...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* *Sniffle*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...

records.m_Talk_DEU: If we were to find the treasure... that means we have to fight Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we were to find the treasure... that means we have to fight Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to fight her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to fight her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to fight her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand how you feel, but this isn't something that can be solved by throwing a tantrum.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand how you feel, but this isn't something that can be solved by throwing a tantrum.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My world..! My future is...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My world..! My future is...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nothing without Mother!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nothing without Mother!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nothing without Mother!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?! Vines?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?! Vines?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing?! Let me go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...

records.m_Talk_DEU: Where are you going alone?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where are you going alone?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: SOLOVEY!
records.m_Talk_DEU: SOLOVEY!
records.m_Talk_FRA: SOLOVEY!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... don't want to go back into the inner yard anymore...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... don't want to go back into the inner yard anymore...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... don't want to go back into the inner yard anymore...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... just wanted to see her again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... just wanted to see her again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... just wanted to see her again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to say that I missed her... and for her to hug me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to say that I missed her... and for her to hug me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to say that I missed her... and for her to hug me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I could endure all those years alone... I believed I would meet her again someday...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I could endure all those years alone... I believed I would meet her again someday...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I could endure all those years alone... I believed I would meet her again someday...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What am I supposed to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What am I supposed to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What am I supposed to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The star... it's shining?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The star... it's shining?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The star... it's shining?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That light in the sky...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That light in the sky...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That light in the sky...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it the Fishing Rod?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it the Fishing Rod?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it the Fishing Rod?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: How long have I been running?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How long have I been running?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How long have I been running?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My vision is getting increasingly blurry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My vision is getting increasingly blurry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My vision is getting increasingly blurry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Am I... going the right way?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Am I... going the right way?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Am I... going the right way?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this fog...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this fog...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this fog...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not something dangerous like Corruption rays, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not something dangerous like Corruption rays, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not something dangerous like Corruption rays, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be scared of whatever might happen once you open the door, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be scared of whatever might happen once you open the door, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be scared of whatever might happen once you open the door, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right. I remember.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right. I remember.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right. I remember.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I felt this same energy when I first opened the door of the garden.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I felt this same energy when I first opened the door of the garden.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I felt this same energy when I first opened the door of the garden.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What I will see from this point on is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What I will see from this point on is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What I will see from this point on is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...memories of the past.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...memories of the past.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...memories of the past.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is that?! Where did that monster appear from?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is that?! Where did that monster appear from?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is that?! Where did that monster appear from?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Argh! It feels like something is crawling under my skin... I don't like it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Argh! It feels like something is crawling under my skin... I don't like it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Argh! It feels like something is crawling under my skin... I don't like it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's over now! There is nowhere to run!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's over now! There is nowhere to run!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's over now! There is nowhere to run!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop, Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop, Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop, Pavlin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The people are in danger! We must save them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The people are in danger! We must save them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The people are in danger! We must save them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is not the C.O. you know of. It's not something that we can stop!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is not the C.O. you know of. It's not something that we can stop!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is not the C.O. you know of. It's not something that we can stop!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration! It's our job to protect the people
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration! It's our job to protect the people
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration! It's our job to protect the people
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration has lost most of its units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration has lost most of its units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration has lost most of its units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, are you going to die in vain trying to prevent what has already been predetermined?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, are you going to die in vain trying to prevent what has already been predetermined?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, are you going to die in vain trying to prevent what has already been predetermined?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have I not made it clear?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have I not made it clear?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have I not made it clear?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's fate was decided.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's fate was decided.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's fate was decided.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... Hrgh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... Hrgh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... Hrgh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all my fault. I was weak...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all my fault. I was weak...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all my fault. I was weak...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I promised to save the world... but I couldn't even save my comrades in front of me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I promised to save the world... but I couldn't even save my comrades in front of me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I promised to save the world... but I couldn't even save my comrades in front of me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin. It's not your fault the Wolf died. It's mine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin. It's not your fault the Wolf died. It's mine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin. It's not your fault the Wolf died. It's mine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the Wolf's life was taken by <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> who is using the Qliphoth Game as an excuse to toy with us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the Wolf's life was taken by <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> who is using the Qliphoth Game as an excuse to toy with us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the Wolf's life was taken by <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> who is using the Qliphoth Game as an excuse to toy with us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this where this world ends?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this where this world ends?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this where this world ends?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe so.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe so.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe so.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the whims of the god Tammiel do not stop here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the whims of the god Tammiel do not stop here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the whims of the god Tammiel do not stop here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She will create another world exactly like this, and destroy it the same way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She will create another world exactly like this, and destroy it the same way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She will create another world exactly like this, and destroy it the same way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But why?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But why?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But why?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Does god... want us to suffer forever?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Does god... want us to suffer forever?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Does god... want us to suffer forever?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... do not know. And neither does the Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... do not know. And neither does the Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... do not know. And neither does the Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it doesn't matter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it doesn't matter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it doesn't matter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever it is that Tammiel wants, we will put an end to it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever it is that Tammiel wants, we will put an end to it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever it is that Tammiel wants, we will put an end to it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, stand back up. Our priority right now is to get back to the Ark alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, stand back up. Our priority right now is to get back to the Ark alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, stand back up. Our priority right now is to get back to the Ark alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is... abandoning all those people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is... abandoning all those people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is... abandoning all those people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know it's out of their hands, but... there were children who were much younger than me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know it's out of their hands, but... there were children who were much younger than me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know it's out of their hands, but... there were children who were much younger than me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...? The garden?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...? The garden?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...? The garden?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's someone I've never seen before with Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's someone I've never seen before with Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's someone I've never seen before with Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who is that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who is that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who is that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The world... is going to restart?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The world... is going to restart?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The world... is going to restart?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The end of this world means the birth of another.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The end of this world means the birth of another.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The end of this world means the birth of another.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like a watermill, it always returns to its original position.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like a watermill, it always returns to its original position.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like a watermill, it always returns to its original position.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then we... will forget everything and repeat this fate again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then we... will forget everything and repeat this fate again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then we... will forget everything and repeat this fate again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Administrator, you said that you are able to remember the past worlds through the Ark, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Administrator, you said that you are able to remember the past worlds through the Ark, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Administrator, you said that you are able to remember the past worlds through the Ark, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How many cycles of this have we gone through?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How many cycles of this have we gone through?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How many cycles of this have we gone through?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Too much that I can't see the beginning of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Too much that I can't see the beginning of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Too much that I can't see the beginning of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There have been countless attempts to stop this cycle, and we have made progress each time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There have been countless attempts to stop this cycle, and we have made progress each time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There have been countless attempts to stop this cycle, and we have made progress each time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, it's not easy finding a path to an ending that we never reached before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, it's not easy finding a path to an ending that we never reached before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, it's not easy finding a path to an ending that we never reached before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Master once told me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Master once told me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Master once told me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That in the first world, we couldn't even struggle, much less attempt anything against the apocalypse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That in the first world, we couldn't even struggle, much less attempt anything against the apocalypse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That in the first world, we couldn't even struggle, much less attempt anything against the apocalypse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now, Master is here... and we have an amazing technology called the Ark.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now, Master is here... and we have an amazing technology called the Ark.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now, Master is here... and we have an amazing technology called the Ark.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps if we keep on going... a day will come when this tragedy will cease.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps if we keep on going... a day will come when this tragedy will cease.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps if we keep on going... a day will come when this tragedy will cease.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope so.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope so.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope so.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must make it so.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must make it so.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must make it so.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This memory is about the day the Administration left the treasure with Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This memory is about the day the Administration left the treasure with Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This memory is about the day the Administration left the treasure with Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother told me that we would meet the Administration again one day, but... this is different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother told me that we would meet the Administration again one day, but... this is different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother told me that we would meet the Administration again one day, but... this is different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The expressions on their faces... aren't expecting a reunion at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The expressions on their faces... aren't expecting a reunion at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The expressions on their faces... aren't expecting a reunion at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you need me in order to reach the ending where the world is saved...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you need me in order to reach the ending where the world is saved...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you need me in order to reach the ending where the world is saved...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll gladly follow your plan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll gladly follow your plan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll gladly follow your plan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I appreciate it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I appreciate it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I appreciate it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also...

root.m_Talk_ENG:
To put this burden on you, I'm
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
To put this burden on you, I'm
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
To put this burden on you, I'm
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: As the Antagonist... I was disappointed that I couldn't be more helpful. But I'm glad you suggested this to me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As the Antagonist... I was disappointed that I couldn't be more helpful. But I'm glad you suggested this to me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As the Antagonist... I was disappointed that I couldn't be more helpful. But I'm glad you suggested this to me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, please don't so look sad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, please don't so look sad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, please don't so look sad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't look back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't look back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't look back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You entrusted me with this mission not to regret it, but for everyone's future. Right, Administrator?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You entrusted me with this mission not to regret it, but for everyone's future. Right, Administrator?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You entrusted me with this mission not to regret it, but for everyone's future. Right, Administrator?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, it's just us two, my child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, it's just us two, my child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, it's just us two, my child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry... that I haven't done anything for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry... that I haven't done anything for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry... that I haven't done anything for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...No. Please don't say that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...No. Please don't say that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...No. Please don't say that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were my whole world, Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were my whole world, Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were my whole world, Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... was happy just being with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... was happy just being with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... was happy just being with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so sorry...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so sorry...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so sorry...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't protect the future... you would be born into.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't protect the future... you would be born into.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't protect the future... you would be born into.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm right here. You raised me, Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm right here. You raised me, Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm right here. You raised me, Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you saying that?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you saying that?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you saying that?!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That sounds as if...! I was never supposed to be born
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
That sounds as if...! I was never supposed to be born
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
That sounds as if...! I was never supposed to be born
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Home?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Home?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Home?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oww.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oww.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oww.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Careful now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Careful now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Careful now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you are a young Counter, you'll need to rest for your broken bones to heal properly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you are a young Counter, you'll need to rest for your broken bones to heal properly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you are a young Counter, you'll need to rest for your broken bones to heal properly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where's Mother...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where's Mother...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where's Mother...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you defeat her, Parry?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you defeat her, Parry?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you defeat her, Parry?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not that strong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not that strong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not that strong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I calmed her down for a moment so she wouldn't step out of the door.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I calmed her down for a moment so she wouldn't step out of the door.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I calmed her down for a moment so she wouldn't step out of the door.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother...

root.m_Talk_ENG: She can't return to who she was, can she?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She can't return to who she was, can she?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She can't return to who she was, can she?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I will stop here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I will stop here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I will stop here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to do anything anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to do anything anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to do anything anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is a memory that Pavlin stored in the deepest part of the inner yard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is a memory that Pavlin stored in the deepest part of the inner yard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is a memory that Pavlin stored in the deepest part of the inner yard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In order to get that memory back, I need your help with Pavlin's Watch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In order to get that memory back, I need your help with Pavlin's Watch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In order to get that memory back, I need your help with Pavlin's Watch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see that the treasure is more important to you, Parry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see that the treasure is more important to you, Parry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see that the treasure is more important to you, Parry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration was going to use Mother from the start, didn't they?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration was going to use Mother from the start, didn't they?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration was going to use Mother from the start, didn't they?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin was our comrade. And we don't take advantage of comrades.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin was our comrade. And we don't take advantage of comrades.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin was our comrade. And we don't take advantage of comrades.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's what you think, Parry!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's what you think, Parry!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's what you think, Parry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead of saving the world, the Administration left Mother here and fled!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instead of saving the world, the Administration left Mother here and fled!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead of saving the world, the Administration left Mother here and fled!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was Pavlin's choice! We didn't force her...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was Pavlin's choice! We didn't force her...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was Pavlin's choice! We didn't force her...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* *Sniffle*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* *Sniffle*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* *Sniffle*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we were to find the treasure... that means we have to fight Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we were to find the treasure... that means we have to fight Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we were to find the treasure... that means we have to fight Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to fight her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to fight her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to fight her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand how you feel, but this isn't something that can be solved by throwing a tantrum.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand how you feel, but this isn't something that can be solved by throwing a tantrum.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand how you feel, but this isn't something that can be solved by throwing a tantrum.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We need that memory intact to save the world's future.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We need that memory intact to save the world's future.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We need that memory intact to save the world's future.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The world's... future?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The world's... future?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The world's... future?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not interested in something I've never seen before!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not interested in something I've never seen before!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not interested in something I've never seen before!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My world..! My future is...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: My world..! My future is...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: My world..! My future is...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's nothing without Mother!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's nothing without Mother!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's nothing without Mother!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?! Vines?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?! Vines?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?! Vines?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing?! Let me go!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing?! Let me go!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing?! Let me go!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where are you going alone?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where are you going alone?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where are you going alone?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: SOLOVEY!
root.m_Talk_DEU: SOLOVEY!
root.m_Talk_FRA: SOLOVEY!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... don't want to go back into the inner yard anymore...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... don't want to go back into the inner yard anymore...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... don't want to go back into the inner yard anymore...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... just wanted to see her again...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... just wanted to see her again...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... just wanted to see her again...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to say that I missed her... and for her to hug me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to say that I missed her... and for her to hug me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to say that I missed her... and for her to hug me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I could endure all those years alone... I believed I would meet her again someday...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I could endure all those years alone... I believed I would meet her again someday...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I could endure all those years alone... I believed I would meet her again someday...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What am I supposed to do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What am I supposed to do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What am I supposed to do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The star... it's shining?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The star... it's shining?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The star... it's shining?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That light in the sky...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That light in the sky...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That light in the sky...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it the Fishing Rod?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it the Fishing Rod?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it the Fishing Rod?
